items.title: Woman Convicted of Fraud in Sale of Her Company to JPMorgan Chase Is Sentenced to 7 Years in Prison
items.description: Charlie Javice was convicted on fraud charges for significantly inflating the user base of her online platform. Her lawyers are planning an appeal.

items.title: Sector Update: Financial Stocks Decline Late Afternoon
items.description: Financial stocks were decreasing in late Tuesday trading, with the NYSE Financial Index shedding 0.7

items.title: Sector Update: Financial Stocks Retreat Tuesday Afternoon
items.description: Financial stocks were decreasing in Tuesday afternoon trading, with the NYSE Financial Index droppin

items.title: Mega Wall Street dealmakers are having their best year ever
items.description: In 2025, companies have announced 49 global 'mega deals,' the highest such count through the first nine months of any year ever.

items.title: Fed Pivots: What it Means for MS' Capital Markets Business
items.description: The Fed rate cut is set to revive corporate deals and trading, positioning Morgan Stanley's capital markets business for stronger growth.
